ayahs.translation: When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,[2005]

ayahs.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waraayta annasa yadkhuloonafee deeni Allahi afwaja
ayahs.translation: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,

ayahs.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wastaghfirhuinnahu kana tawwaba
ayahs.translation: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.[2006]
